title: On bead digest prior to mass spec

materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"956a5","text":"urea","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9p42c","text":"ammonium bicarbonate","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4m0n6","text":"LysC (mass spectrometry grade, FUJIFILM Wako chemicals) ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cmh2p","text":"trypsin (Trypsin Gold, Promega) ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4oqva","text":"dithiothreitol","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"egvhb","text":"iodoacetamide ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4ig4s","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Add 50 µL of ABC and transfer beads to new 0.2 mL PCR tube and remove buffer Axygen.
Add appropriate volume of 2 Molarity (M) urea 50 millimolar (mM) ABC. Here we added 30 µL .
Add 150 ng LysC/Trypsin (1:1 Mix) and incubate 01:30:00 at Room temperature . Here we added 1.5 µL .
Transfer supernatant to new 0.2 µL PCR tube. Here, the total volume becomes: 31.5 µL .
Rinse beads with 30 µL 1 Molarity (M) urea 50 millimolar (mM) ABC, combine* 30 µL , sum: 61.5 µL . Optional: 2nd transfer to get rid of all beads.
Reduction: 10 millimolar (mM) DTT (aliquot 0.25 Molarity (M) ) 00:30:00 Room temperature . Here we added 2.4 µL .
Alkylation: 20 Molarity (M) IAA (500mM stock = 0.092 g/mL ) 00:30:00 Room temperature in the dark. Here, we added 2.4 µL .
Quench IAA with half amount of DTT used in step 3 and incubate for 00:10:00 at Room temperature . We added 1.2 µL .
Dilute to 1 Molarity (M) urea with 50 millimolar (mM) ABC. We added 30 µL , which gave rise to a total sum of: 97.5 µL .
Add 150 ng LysC/Trypsin (1:1 Mix) and incubate at 37 °C Overnight . For us here, this meant 1.5 µL .
Acidify sample to final concentration of 0.5% TFA (from 10%). For us this was 4.5 µL .
Desalt: Load the peptides on a C18 STAGEtip. 3-5 plugs depending on protein amount, 3 plugs for max. 20µg.
Equilibrate:
100 µL 100% MeOH, spin 2000 rpm, °C, 3 minutes .
Load sample: spin 1700 rpm, °C, .
Wash: 100 µL 0.1% TFA -> keep flow through (FT) and wash together.
Elute: 2x 30 µL 60% ACN, 0.1% TFA in PCR tube.
100 µL 0.1% TFA, spin 2000 rpm, °C, 3 minutes .
100 µL 80% ACN, 0.1% TFA, spin 2000 rpm, °C, 3 minutes .
Speedvac to remove ACN and take up sample in 20 µL 0.1% TFA 2% ACN.
creator: Elias Adriaenssens
